def positive_expensive_log_argument_built_without_is_enabled_guard():
    rule_id = "expensive_log_argument_built_without_is_enabled_guard"
    family = "observability"
    severity = "contextual"
    status = "stable"
    intent = "captures the smell described by this rule"
    description = "Flag log calls that eagerly build costly payloads without first checking the log level."
    return rule_id, family, severity, status, intent, description
